content: To generate a versions.lock in-image: use Dockerfile RUN layer to run 'npm ls -g --json > /versions-npm.json' and capture govulncheck version via 'govulncheck --version >> /versions-govulncheck.txt'. The JSON from npm ls -g captures top-level versions; for transitive deps use --depth=Infinity or a specific depth. To extract from the built image without running it: (1) podman build -t image-name ., (2) CID=$(podman create image-name), (3) podman cp $CID:/versions.lock ./versions.lock, (4) podman rm $CID. This avoids needing a running container. The host-side PIN-07 verifier then reads versions.lock, queries the npm registry time field for each package version, and compares against the cooldown date.
